description_long: This is a traditional wooden windmill with a cylindrical, vertically ribbed tower set atop a base of large, irregular stones. The windmill features a conical, shingled roof and four large lattice-style blades, each with a wooden frame and cross-bracing, attached to a central hub. A wooden staircase with railings leads up to a small entry platform, suggesting an accessible interior. The structure is supported by angled wooden beams that brace the tower and connect to the ground for stability. The exterior wood appears weathered, giving the windmill a rustic, historical appearance, while the stone base adds to its sturdy, grounded feel. The windmill is situated on a patch of grassy terrain, enhancing its rural, pastoral character.
description: A rustic wooden windmill with a stone base, conical roof, and four large lattice blades, accessed by a wooden staircase. The structure is weathered and supported by angled beams, set on grassy ground.
description_view_0: Front view showing the staircase, entry platform, and two visible windmill blades, with the stone base and angled support beams prominent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting all four windmill blades in a cross pattern, the full staircase, and the stone base encircling the tower.
description_view_2: Rear angled view focusing on the back of the tower, the conical roof, and the support beams, with only one blade visible from the side.
description_view_3: Direct rear view showing the back support beams, stone base, and the windmill blades extending outward, with the staircase partially visible to the side.
